'''Jagga VII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Venjagga system/Legends|Venjagga system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
